recommended_courses.title: GPU Programming with CUDA
recommended_courses.reason: Deepen low-level hardware acceleration capabilities for next-generation custom kernels.

recommended_courses.title: Large Language Models in Production
recommended_courses.reason: Stay updated on the latest serving and orchestration frameworks like vLLM and TensorRT-LLM.

recommended_projects: Multi-modal Agent Framework: Build an agentic system that runs locally using WebGPU for image and text understanding.
Custom Triton Kernel for KV-Cache Optimization: Write a high-performance Triton kernel to speed up attention mechanisms.
interview_preparation: Focus on system design questions related to distributed training at scale (data/tensor/pipeline parallelism).
Be prepared to explain memory complexity of attention mechanisms and KV cache optimizations in detail.
Prepare behavioral examples demonstrating leadership, conflict resolution, and technical mentorship.

career_roadmap.week_1: Complete NVIDIA Triton / vLLM advanced configuration guide and benchmark local serving performance.
career_roadmap.week_2: Draft design document for the multi-modal WebGPU agent and initialize the project skeleton in Rust.
career_roadmap.week_3: Optimize KV-cache management in the project and run memory profiling using CUDA tools.
career_roadmap.week_4: Update resume with quantified business metrics and practice mock senior system design interviews.
